---
title: "PS270 Final Project"
author: "Ria Karthik"
description: "My final project"
output:
  distill::distill_article:
    self_contained: false
---



## Project thoughts

I am interested in exploring data related to how socioeconomic trends and whether a state is typically red or blue impacts the quality and satisfaction patients have with their healthcare. Leadership and public opinion heavily influence the healthcare policy enforced in each state especially when it comes to public health and medicaid/medicare coverage. Is there a correlation between the type of demographic each state has, the party governors and other politicians identify with, and specific economic factors that determine quality of healthcare?
